Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.proofBuilder

Class ProofSkeletonWithDependencies

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.proofBuilder.ProofSkeletonWithDependencies
All Implemented Interfaces:
IProofSkeleton
public class ProofSkeletonWithDependencies extends Object implements IProofSkeleton
Common implementation for decorating a proof skeleton with proof dependencies.

      private static boolean isTrivialRule(IProofRule rule)

    • withDependencies

      public static ProofSkeletonWithDependencies withDependencies(IProofSkeleton skeleton)
      Returns a proof skeleton decorated with dependencies.
      Parameters:
      skeleton - The proof skeleton
      Returns:
      The proof skeleton with his dependencies associated.

    • computeDependencies

      private static ProofDependenciesBuilder computeDependencies(IProofRule rule, ProofSkeletonWithDependencies[] children)
      Compute the dependencies for this node and his children.
      Returns:
      dependencies of this node.

    • getChildNodes

      public ProofSkeletonWithDependencies[] getChildNodes()
      Description copied from interface: IProofSkeleton
      Returns the children of this node.

      This method always returns an array, even if this node is a leaf node (that is with no rule applied to it). It never returns null.

      Specified by:
      getChildNodes in interface IProofSkeleton
      Returns:
      an array of the children of this node

    • getComment

      public String getComment()
      Description copied from interface: IProofSkeleton
      Returns the comment field of this node.
      Specified by:
      getComment in interface IProofSkeleton
      Returns:
      the comment associated to this node

    • getRule

      public IProofRule getRule()
      Description copied from interface: IProofSkeleton
      Returns the rule applied to this node.
      Specified by:
      getRule in interface IProofSkeleton
      Returns:
      the rule applied to this node or null is this node is a leaf node

    • applyTo

      public boolean applyTo(IProofTreeNode node, boolean dischargeTrivialCase, IProofMonitor proofMonitor)
      Traverses the given skeleton tree in search of a skeleton compatible with the given proof tree node.

      Tries to discharge either the trivial cases (true goal,...) or the non trivial cases, depending on the value of dischargeTrivialCase.

      Parameters:
      node - The open proof tree node where rebuilding should start
      dischargeTrivialCase - if true, apply all the trivial rules of the skeleton to the node. If false, try to find a compatible node in the other rules from the skeleton.
      proofMonitor - The proof monitor that monitors the progress of the rebuild activity
      Returns:
      true iff the proof has been correctly rebuilt.

    • rebuildUnsortedChildren

      public boolean rebuildUnsortedChildren(IProofTreeNode[] nodeChildren, IProofMonitor proofMonitor, boolean dischargeTrivialCase)
      For each node child, tries to find a compatible skeleton node to make a rebuild. Tries to discharge either the trivial cases (true goal,...) or the non trivial cases, depending on the value of dischargeTrivialCase.
      Parameters:
      nodeChildren - children of the open proof tree node where rebuilding should start
      proofMonitor - The proof monitor that monitors the progress of the rebuild activity
      dischargeTrivialCase - if true, apply all the trivial rules of the skeleton to the node. If false, try to find a compatible node in the other rules from the skeleton.
      Returns:
      true iff the proof has been correctly rebuilt.

    • rebuildFromChildren

      private boolean rebuildFromChildren(IProofTreeNode node, int begin, int end, boolean dischargeTrivialCase, IProofMonitor proofMonitor)
      Allows to traverse the children of a given skeleton more efficiently in search for an compatible skeleton to a given node.
      Parameters:
      node - open proof tree node where rebuilding should start
      begin - Initial index of the loop on skeleton children.
      end - Final index of the loop on skeleton children.
      dischargeTrivialCase - If true try a rebuild if the skeleton is a trivial case. If false, checks if the skeleton is not a trivial and is compatible with the node.
      proofMonitor - The proof monitor that monitors the progress of the rebuild activity
      Returns:
      true iff the proof has been correctly rebuilt.

    • hasCompatibleDependencies

      private boolean hasCompatibleDependencies(IProofTreeNode node, IProofMonitor proofMonitor)
      Checks if the node of the proof and the node of the proof skeleton has the same goal and hypothesis and try a rebuild when these conditions are fulfilled. Also try to rebuild the proof when the rule of the skeleton is applicable to a sequent with any goal(ie goal is null).
      Parameters:
      node - The open proof tree node where rebuilding should start.
      proofMonitor - The proof monitor that monitors the progress of the rebuild activity
      Returns:
      true iff the proof has been correctly rebuilt.

    • doRebuild

      private static boolean doRebuild(ProofSkeletonWithDependencies skeleton, IProofTreeNode node, IProofMonitor proofMonitor)

    • isLeafNode

      private boolean isLeafNode()
      Checks if the node a leaf node.
      Returns:
      true iff this node is a leaf node.
